title: [trustless://interop.landscape] Mislav Javor - Composable Batching
description:
In this talk, Mislav Javor (Biconomy, VP of Product) discusses composable batching- how to control for slippage in multi-chain environments.

If we assume that a user wants to do several source chain actions and several destination chain actions - represented by one signable transaction payload - we quickly run into issues of slippage. In particular - when using intent-based cross-chain systems, slippage is incurred almost universally because the solvers must control for reorgs. In this talk, Mislav explores using ERC-4337/ERC-7579 account modules to enable 'Composable Batching' - the ability to dynamically inject the exact value received from a bridge/cross-chain swap into any of the parameters of the destination function call.

Talk given during day 2 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
